name: free text question generates a step-by-step solution

payload.text:
📚 Solution — Addition

Step 1: Identify the numbers to add.
Step 2: Align the numbers by place value.
Step 3: Add each column from right to left.
Step 4: Carry over if a column sum exceeds 9.

📝 Teaching note: Remind students that addition is commutative — the order doesn't matter.
